value: REACT Project – Heavy Metal Monitoring Dataset, Brskovo, Montenegro

REACT (Remote Environmental Assessment and Continuous Metal Tracking)
SP1 (Tara upstream), SP2 (Tara downstream), SP3 (Rudnica River), SP4 (Tunnel), SP5 (Open-pit Brskovo)
Pb, Cd, Cu, Zn (total & dissolved); pH, conductivity, turbidity, temperature, pressure, humidity, wind
